criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: The extent to which the app utilizes artificial intelligence to enhance user experience.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, developer documentation, user reviews.

criteria.name: User Engagement
criteria.description: The level of user activity and interaction within the app.

criteria.name: Privacy and Security
criteria.description: Measures taken by the app to protect user data and ensure privacy.
criteria.sources: Privacy policies, security audits, user feedback.

criteria.name: Innovative Features
criteria.description: Unique functionalities that set the app apart from competitors.
criteria.sources: App feature lists, user reviews, tech blogs.

criteria.name: Market Popularity
criteria.description: The app's popularity and user base size.
criteria.sources: App store rankings, download statistics, user reviews.
